entries.author: Omid
entries.content:
Designed the initial layout and created the first version of:

- **Header** with navigation
- **Blog page** with card grid
- **Changelog page** with timeline

Also started working on the dark mode implementation.

entries.author: Amin
entries.content:
Started learning **Next.js App Router** and set up the project structure.

- Configured Tailwind CSS v4
- Set up Shadcn/ui components
- Created the blog collection with Sveltia CMS
